title: oncidium calanthum
intro: Oncidium calanthum, also known as the 'Bee Orchid', is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the Oncidiinae subtribe. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oncidium calanthum include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
